text: The commissioner is authorized to promulgate rules and regulations to implement the administration of any agreement entered into pursuant to the authority granted in § 405 (Authority to enter into agreements) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14
##### § 405-I — Regulatory authority

The commissioner is authorized to promulgate rules and regulations to implement the administration of any agreement entered into pursuant to the authority granted in § 405 (Authority to enter into agreements) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
